name: Hash and Corn Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the corn muffin mix according to package instructions.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the corn beef hash, chopped onion, and egg.
3. Blend the grated Parmesan cheese into the corn muffin batter.
4. Grease a 9-inch square baking pan.
5. Pour half of the corn muffin mix into the pan.
6. Spread the corn beef hash mixture over the corn muffin layer, forming a sandwich.
7. Pour the remaining corn muffin mix over the corn beef hash.
8. Bake at 400 degrees for 20 to 25 minutes or until done.
